trans.explain: The user said “barcode” · the ASR wrote “vargoor”. A field-support ticket keyed on a wrong barcode fails silently. This is exactly the kind of miss only a human ear catches.

pron.explain: The agent mispronounced the city “Surat”. City names are one of the top reasons clients buy the pronunciation-audit dataset · the model has to say them the way locals do.

issue.setup: Play from 03:40. The user says their store name. Watch what the agent does with it, then log the issue the way you would in the tool.
issue.explain: The user clearly said the store name and the agent never captured it. The expert logged: “the user mentioned their store name but wasn't captured”. Wrong or missing input capture breaks everything downstream, and no transcript-reading judge can see it.
